isi.lyrics:
Lyric Lim Seul Ong - Rainbow Light (English Ver.)

Romanization

I walk alone through neon skies
Where shadows fall and memories lie
Your voice still echoes in the breeze
A silent song that never leaves

But then I see you in the glow
A color fading, soft and slow
You were the calm after the fight
You were my rainbow light

Oh, you shine through the darkest days
Like a dream that never fades
Every shade, so pure, so bright
You were my rainbow light
Even if we said goodbye
You're still dancing in my mind
Fading slow, but holding tight
You're still my rainbow light

I drift alone through glowing skies
Where silence holds the past in lies
I still see you in my sleep
Like a flame that burns too deep
You're the song I can't rewrite
You're still my rainbow light

I saw your shadow in the glow
A hue that sank so soft and low
You were the hush before the night
You were my rainbow light

Oh, you shine through the darkest days
Like a dream that never fades
Every shade, so pure, so bright
You were my rainbow light
Even if we said goodbye
You're still dancing in my mind
Fading slow, but holding tight
